visual_description: In a modern office with glass walls, five men are gathered around a large, dark conference table. Four men are seated, with two wearing white shirts and dark ties, and two in light blue shirts. A fifth man, dressed in a white shirt and dark tie, stands at the head of the table, facing the others, with a small television screen visible to the left.
audio_description: A male voice speaks in Mandarin Chinese, delivering a statement in a clear, steady tone.
